{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231721354E6CB7656DD99532EEDA"}"},"total":1311},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592984162651898649","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"想写个书评 第一次写评价写的不好大家见谅 两个好宝宝就这样一直在一起吧🥺🥺 我们小迟简直萌到不行 小秦你就宠吧 甜到爆炸了我说 暧昧期拉扯写的好好 两个宝宝都很棒 会在意对方的感受和心情 特别多的小萌点太戳我了 总之就是强烈推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767881463,"group_id":"7574121404262517822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NypFbsEqr7+94/57/93ZF7o=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b68e112e3bf4dc0b6deeb5e5960abe9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795961&x-signature=d7g%2FBl331VT1pR9LgaBizZ5GHAs%3D","user_id":"50995446677939","user_name":"猜猜0218"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50995446677939","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574121404262517822","book_info":{"abstract":"脸皮很厚闷骚攻vs口是心非冷脸受【1v1】【电竞】【ABO】
迟非凡被渣男绿了，他怒气冲冲地踹开KTV包间大门，二话不说把人揍了一顿。
可他怎么都不会想到，因为这一趟，他会阴差阳错晕倒进医院。
好消息是，身体没什么大碍，就是二次分化成了个Omega。
坏消息是，腺体没长好，需要高匹配度Alpha信息素进行引导治疗。
医生：“比如进行简单的肢体接触，牵手、拥抱，也可以隔空进行信息素交换，时间久了建议进行临时标记。”
迟非凡脸色铁青。
“我不治了。”
让他跟一个陌生人亲密接触？
他最讨厌跟人有肢体接触了。
还不如让他身患绝症死了算了。
然而——
多个月后。
国内老牌豪门战队Hawk夺冠后即将接受赛后采访。
队长秦逸跟男朋友双双失踪！
经理急得像热锅上的蚂蚁，把两人电话差点打爆。
“不是说上个厕所吗，两人全掉进去了？！”
殊不知某个不当人的秦队正把人堵在后台休息室里亲。
迟非凡被咬疼了，眼眶不争气地红了：“秦逸你属狗的？你是变态吗！”
秦逸笑着释放出信息素，脸不红心不跳。
“变态？我只是来拿夺冠后的奖励。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0f68dc0fd8412b14044013773f3b0b27","author":"对对对你说的对","author_id":"","book_id":"7574121404262517822","book_name":"【电竞】信息素说我们天生一对","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574121728960365081","read_count":"66290","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354634"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"150","tags":"双男主,甜宠,电竞,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c7f6dbdf3abd9ce94022e69d99e61bd0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441695&x-signature=D5cmmCAeGBNB%2BGPA98xhz7bYB4s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2283032727008616","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231721354E6CB7656DD99532EEDA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":38,"forwarded_count":0,"li
